description: Use vr.dev's own verifiers to continuously test vr.dev. Runs the SDK test suite, checks code quality, verifies the frontend renders, and produces a test report artifact. Demonstrates recursive self-verification: if the verification infrastructure can't verify itself, it shouldn't be trusted to verify anything else.
preconditions: Network access to vr.dev frontend (for browser check)
exit_criteria: All SDK tests pass (pytest exit code 0)
vr.dev landing page renders with expected hero element
Test report artifact written to disk
